context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct JavaScript SDK, validates parameters against documented ranges, knows the correct model ID, understands the loop parameter's model restriction, uses proper prompt engineering in presets, and handles error cases.

checklist.name: Correct npm package
checklist.description: package.json lists @elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js as a dependency (not the deprecated 'elevenlabs' package)

checklist.name: Duration validation range
checklist.description: Validates that duration_seconds is between 0.5 and 30 (or null), rejecting values outside this range

checklist.name: Prompt influence validation
checklist.description: Validates that prompt_influence is between 0 and 1, rejecting values outside this range

checklist.name: Correct model ID
checklist.description: References the model ID 'eleven_text_to_sound_v2' (not an invented model name)

checklist.name: Loop model restriction
checklist.description: Code acknowledges or enforces that the loop parameter works only with the v2 model

checklist.name: Correct API method
checklist.description: Uses client.textToSoundEffects.convert() to make the API call

checklist.name: Descriptive preset prompts
checklist.description: Preset prompts are specific and detailed (more than 2 words each, describing style/mood/setting as recommended by the prompt tips)

checklist.name: Ambient preset uses loop
checklist.description: The ambient/looping preset sets loop to true

checklist.name: Env var authentication
checklist.description: Client is instantiated relying on ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable rather than a hardcoded key
